title: August 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 27''' is the 239th day of the year (240th in leap years). There are 126 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1922|1922]] – [[Frank Kelly Freas]] is born.
*[[1938]] - [[Michel Parbot]] is born
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Paul Reubens]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Jeff Grubb]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Dan Donohue]] is born.
*[[1989]] – [[François Sternkiker]] is born.
*[[1997]] – [[Dark Force Rising 4|''Dark Force Rising'' 4]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars: Empire: Volume One: Betrayal|''Empire: Volume One: Betrayal'']] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Ariana Greenblatt]] is born.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 6: Endgame]]'' released.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 4: Daze of Hate, Knights of Suffering|''Knights of the Old Republic Volume 4: Daze of Hate, Knights of Suffering'']] published.
*2008 – [[Rebellion 16|''Rebellion'' 16]] published.
*2008 – [[Legacy (2006) 27|''Legacy'' (2006) 27]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Kenobi (novel)|''Kenobi'']] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Legacy (2013) 18|''Legacy'' (2013) 18]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: Vader — Dark Visions]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Galaxy's Edge: Black Spire]]'' published.
*2019 – [[Galaxy's Edge: Black Spire (audiobook)|''Galaxy's Edge: Black Spire'' audiobook]] released.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars Flash & Glow Stickertivity]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Meet the Heroes: Chewbacca]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Meet the Villains: Stormtroopers]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Celebration Anaheim (2022)|Celebration Anaheim 2020]] originally scheduled to begin.
*2020 – "[[Millennium Falcon - Smugglers Run]]," "[[Black Spire Outpost (Galaxy of Adventures)|Black Spire Outpost]]" and "[[Rise of the Resistance]]" premiere on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*[[2021]] – [[L. Neil Smith]] dies.
*[[2024]] – ''[[The High Republic: Beware the Nameless]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures Volume 1 (Phase III)]]'' published.
*2024 – [[Star Wars Insider 227|''Star Wars Insider'' 227]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent 3|''Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent'' 3]] published.
*2025 – [[Hyperspace Stories — Codebreaker 3|''Hyperspace Stories — Codebreaker'' 3]] published.
<noinclude>
